name: ◁ Kofta Bil TahiniBAKED KOFTA WITH TAHINI

ingredients.item:
KOFTA
1 small onion, cut into quarters
1 cup (50 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original:
KOFTA
1 small onion, cut into quarters
1 cup (50 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item:
SAUCE
1 cup (240 ml) tahini
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
ingredients.original:
SAUCE
1 cup (240 ml) tahini
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice (about 1½ lemons)
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice (about 1½ lemons)

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon olive oil
¼ cup (30 g) slivered almonds
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon olive oil
¼ cup (30 g) slivered almonds

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE KOFTA: Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and position a rack in the middle.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE KOFTA: Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and position a rack in the middle.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the onion, parsley, and garlic to a food processor and pulse until chopped very fine. (If you do not have a food processor, you can chop very finely with a knife.) Using your hands, squeeze out as much moisture from the mixture as possible over a bowl.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the onion, parsley, and garlic to a food processor and pulse until chopped very fine. (If you do not have a food processor, you can chop very finely with a knife.) Using your hands, squeeze out as much moisture from the mixture as possible over a bowl.

ingredients.item: 3 Transfer the mixture to a large bowl, then add the beef, seven spice, 1½ teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon paprika, black pepper, bread crumbs, pomegranate molasses, and oil. Mix well using your hands, ensuring all the spices are well incorporated. Shape the kofta mixture into 16 equal-sized meatballs; form each meatball into a log shape by elongating it with your fingers.
ingredients.original: 3 Transfer the mixture to a large bowl, then add the beef, seven spice, 1½ teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon paprika, black pepper, bread crumbs, pomegranate molasses, and oil. Mix well using your hands, ensuring all the spices are well incorporated. Shape the kofta mixture into 16 equal-sized meatballs; form each meatball into a log shape by elongating it with your fingers.

ingredients.item: 4 In a 9½-inch (24 cm) round, oven-safe skillet that is 2 inches (5 cm) deep, sear the kofta as you shape them for a few minutes on each side until browned. (Oil is not required for this step.) They do not need to cook all the way through. If you do not have an oven-safe skillet, sear in any skillet then transfer to an oven-safe baking dish.
ingredients.original: 4 In a 9½-inch (24 cm) round, oven-safe skillet that is 2 inches (5 cm) deep, sear the kofta as you shape them for a few minutes on each side until browned. (Oil is not required for this step.) They do not need to cook all the way through. If you do not have an oven-safe skillet, sear in any skillet then transfer to an oven-safe baking dish.
